subject: Faith and Character
title: Faith and Character - Grade 5
description: An optional Christian custom library for character formation, Bible-connected reflection, service, stewardship, and Bible and Church History.
contentGuardrails: This library is explicitly Christian in purpose and tone.
Reflection prompts should invite thoughtful response without grading a student's private faith or sincerity.
Bible references, prayer wording, and faith language should remain teacher-editable.
Sensitive prompts should be previewed by the teacher before students see them.

units.title: Belonging, Identity, and Dignity
units.unitGoal: Students will recognize that each person has worth and that classroom communities should help people feel safe, seen, respected, and valued as people made by God.

lessons.title: I Am Unique
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned Christian character activity about noticing personal gifts, strengths, and God-given dignity without asking students to share private family details.

lessons.title: Everyone Belongs
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity about welcome, inclusion, and love of neighbour in classroom community.

lessons.title: Names, Stories, and Respect
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity about listening respectfully and honouring each person's story.

lessons.title: Words That Build Up
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity about choosing speech that encourages, repairs, and protects dignity.

lessons.title: Welcoming Others
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned scenario activity about noticing who may feel left out and choosing a welcoming response.

lessons.title: Respecting Differences
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity about showing respect while keeping Christian convictions clear and gracious.

lessons.title: Gratitude for Gifts and Strengths
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned gratitude activity about using gifts to serve others.

lessons.title: Creating a Class Covenant
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity for shaping classroom promises around respect, care, truthfulness, and welcome.

lessons.title: Collection Reflection
lessons.teacherOverview: Gentle reflection on belonging, dignity, and what students want to practice next.

lessons.title: Culminating Task
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned identity shield, belonging reflection, or class covenant response.

units.title: Kindness, Empathy, and Compassion
units.unitGoal: Students will practice noticing feelings, listening well, and choosing caring responses that reflect love of neighbour.

lessons.title: What Kindness Looks Like
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity about recognizing kindness in words, actions, tone, and follow-through.

lessons.title: Reading Feelings
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity about noticing emotions without making assumptions or embarrassing others.

lessons.title: Listening With Care
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned practice for attentive listening and gentle questions.

lessons.title: Helping Without Taking Over
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned scenarios about offering help respectfully.

lessons.title: Including Someone Left Out
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned scenario activity about inclusion, courage, and compassion.

lessons.title: Words for Apology and Encouragement
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity about helpful apology language and truthful encouragement.

lessons.title: Compassion in Action
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity connecting compassion to small concrete choices.

lessons.title: Planning a Kindness Challenge
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned class or home kindness challenge with teacher-selected boundaries.

lessons.title: Collection Reflection
lessons.teacherOverview: Gentle reflection on empathy, kindness, and love of neighbour.

lessons.title: Culminating Task
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned kindness challenge plan or empathy scenario response.

units.title: Honesty, Responsibility, and Integrity
units.unitGoal: Students will explore truthful choices, responsibility, trust, and repair after mistakes.

lessons.title: Truth and Trust
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity about how truthfulness supports trust and community.

lessons.title: Owning My Choices
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned scenario activity about responsibility without shame.

lessons.title: Small Choices Matter
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity about small habits and integrity.

lessons.title: Repairing Harm
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity about apology, repair, and wise adult help when needed.

lessons.title: Responsibility at School
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity about classroom responsibility and follow-through.

lessons.title: Responsibility at Home or in Community
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned reflection that avoids requiring private family disclosures.

lessons.title: Integrity When No One Is Watching
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity about choosing what is right even when it is quiet or unseen.

lessons.title: Making a Better Choice Plan
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity for next-step planning after a mistake.

lessons.title: Collection Reflection
lessons.teacherOverview: Gentle reflection on truth, responsibility, and repair.

lessons.title: Culminating Task
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned responsibility checklist, repair plan, or scenario reflection.

units.title: Courage, Resilience, and Hope
units.unitGoal: Students will learn how courage, perseverance, help-seeking, and hopeful thinking can support growth through challenge.

lessons.title: What Courage Means
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity about courage as wise, faithful action, not pretending nothing is hard.

lessons.title: Trying Again
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity about perseverance and learning from attempts.

lessons.title: Asking for Help
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity about wise help-seeking from trusted adults and friends.

lessons.title: Learning From Mistakes
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity about growth, humility, and next steps.

lessons.title: Encouraging Myself and Others
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity about encouragement that is truthful and hopeful.

lessons.title: Hopeful Thinking
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity connecting hope with trust, patience, and wise action.

lessons.title: Choosing a Next Step
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity for breaking challenges into manageable next steps.

lessons.title: My Resilience Toolbox
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity for collecting healthy strategies and trusted supports.

lessons.title: Collection Reflection
lessons.teacherOverview: Gentle reflection on courage, resilience, help, and hope.

lessons.title: Culminating Task
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned resilience strategy card or story response.

units.title: Service, Stewardship, and Community
units.unitGoal: Students will connect character learning to service, care for creation and shared spaces, and contribution to the common good.

lessons.title: What It Means to Serve
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity about service as humble love in action.

lessons.title: Needs in Our Classroom
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity for noticing practical needs and helpful responses.

lessons.title: Needs in Our Community
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity for age-appropriate community awareness.

lessons.title: Caring for Shared Spaces
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity about stewardship of classrooms, homes, churches, and neighbourhood spaces.

lessons.title: Stewardship and Gratitude
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity connecting gratitude, care, and responsible use of what God provides.

lessons.title: Small Acts With Big Impact
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity about faithful small actions.

lessons.title: Planning a Service Action
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned teacher-guided service planning activity.

lessons.title: Reflecting on Service
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned reflection about what students noticed, learned, and appreciated through service.

lessons.title: Collection Reflection
lessons.teacherOverview: Gentle reflection on service, stewardship, gratitude, and community care.

lessons.title: Culminating Task
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned service project plan or stewardship reflection.

units.title: Peace, Forgiveness, and Leadership
units.unitGoal: Students will practice peaceful problem solving, healthy forgiveness, boundary-aware conflict repair, and leadership through service.

lessons.title: Peaceful Words
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity about choosing calm and truthful words during conflict.

lessons.title: Cooling Down Before Responding
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity about pausing, praying or reflecting, and seeking help before responding.

lessons.title: Solving Conflict Fairly
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned scenarios for fair conflict repair with trusted adult support when needed.

lessons.title: Forgiveness and Boundaries
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned sensitive activity distinguishing forgiveness, repair, trust, and safety.

lessons.title: Making Amends
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity about apology, restitution, and changed behaviour.

lessons.title: Leadership Through Service
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity about leadership as responsibility and service.

lessons.title: Leading by Example
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity about steady choices that help others.

lessons.title: Preparing a Peace Plan
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity for building a personal or class peace plan.

lessons.title: Collection Reflection
lessons.teacherOverview: Gentle reflection on peace, forgiveness, boundaries, and leadership.

lessons.title: Culminating Task
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned peace plan, role play, or leadership reflection.

units.title: Bible and Church History
units.unitGoal: Students will learn the broad story of Scripture and selected parts of church history in a respectful, age-appropriate way, connecting Bible knowledge with Christian identity, worship, service, and faithful living.

lessons.title: The Big Story of the Bible
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned Bible overview activity tracing creation, fall, promise, redemption, and restoration in age-appropriate language.

lessons.title: Creation, Fall, Promise, and Covenant
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity about key Old Testament themes and God's faithfulness.

lessons.title: Jesus in the Gospels
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity about Jesus' life, teaching, death, and resurrection with teacher-selected scripture references.

lessons.title: The Early Church in Acts
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity about the early church, prayer, witness, community, and mission.

lessons.title: Christians Through History
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned survey of selected Christians through history, avoiding denominational arguments unless a teacher customizes the activity.

lessons.title: Worship, Scripture, and Prayer
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity about Christian practices, with wording editable for family, church, or school tradition.

lessons.title: Mission, Service, and Witness
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned activity connecting faith, service, and witness in gracious age-appropriate ways.

lessons.title: My Place in God's Story
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned reflection about belonging, calling, service, and faithful living without grading private faith.

lessons.title: Collection Reflection
lessons.teacherOverview: Gentle reflection on Scripture, church history, worship, service, and what students want to keep learning.

lessons.title: Culminating Task
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned Bible timeline, church history profile, family or church heritage reflection, or short presentation plan.
